scenarios.description: When parent is null (branch r1 == null) returns UntrackedAttr constant
scenarios.precondition: Attribute attr = new Attribute("key", "val", null); no stubs or mocks required

scenarios.description: When parent present (branch r1 != null) delegates to parent.sourceRange(key)
scenarios.precondition: Attributes stubParent = new Attributes() { public int indexOfKey(String k){return 0;} public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k){return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4);} }; Attribute attr = new Attribute("data", "value", stubParent); stub simulates sourceRange
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is a Range.AttributeRange with start=1,end=2,nameStart=3,nameEnd=4
pseudocode: TEST TC02 sourceRange with parent stub
public Range.AttributeRange sourceRange(String k) { return new Range.AttributeRange(1,2,3,4); }
